page.content: In Table 1, the parameters analyzed include Age (y), ACD (mm), AL (mm), Preoperative UDVA, Preoperative CDVA, Spherical Refractiona (D), Cylindrical Refractiona (D), and SEa (D). For Group A1, the mean age is 59.23 ± 7.12 with a median of 57.00 (range 51.00 to 74.00), ACD is 3.15 ± 0.36 with a median of 3.26 (range 2.60 to 3.78), AL is 23.68 ± 1.16 with a median of 23.49 (range 21.96 to 26.45), Preoperative UDVA is 0.52 ± 0.18 with a median of 0.52 (range 0.22 to 1.00), Preoperative CDVA is 0.40 ± 0.14 with a median of 0.40 (range 0.10 to 0.70), Spherical Refractiona is −0.11 ± 0.21 with a median of 0.00 (range −0.50 to 0.25), Cylindrical Refractiona is −0.34 ± 0.21 with a median of −0.38 (range −0.75 to 0.00), and SEa is −0.28 ± 0.22 with a median of −0.25 (range −0.63 to 0.25). For Group B1, the mean age is 61.52 ± 7.86 with a median of 62.00 (range 43.00 to 77.00), ACD is 3.24 ± 0.41 with a median of 3.34 (range 2.54 to 3.81), AL is 24.29 ± 1.53 with a median of 24.37 (range 22.00 to 26.84), Preoperative UDVA is 0.58 ± 0.16 with a median of 0.60 (range 0.30 to 0.82), Preoperative CDVA is 0.47 ± 0.12 with a median of 0.40 (range 0.20 to 0.70), Spherical Refractiona is −0.13 ± 0.24 with a median of 0.00 (range −0.50 to 0.25), Cylindrical Refractiona is −0.37 ± 0.24 with a median of −0.50 (range −0.75 to 0.00), and SEa is −0.32 ± 0.23 with a median of −0.38 (range −0.75 to 0.13).

page.content: In Table 2, sources include STT, STF, and MT, with corresponding values for Single Sensor (Average), MSP, and MSA. For STT, the SIFT is 91.3%, FAST is 87.1%, ASIFT is 52.3%, and Average is 74.8%; for STF, SIFT is 11.8%, FAST is 9.1%, ASIFT is 4.5%, and Average is 5%; for MT, SIFT is 51.1%, FAST is 46.4%, ASIFT is 32.7%, and Average is 30.5%. Overall, the average time cost (ms) is 288 for SIFT, 419 for FAST, and 227 for ASIFT, with 2987 for the overall average, while the values for MSP and MSA are not applicable.
